title: Stallion
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
{{Image}}
'''''Stallion''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. As the [[Battle on the Frontier]] drew to a close, Corvette ''Stallion'' escorted [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B frigate]] ''[[Gaarni]]'' to replace the battle-weary [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] ''[[Ludwick]]''. The ''Stallion's'' task force arrived to relieve [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] initial invasion force sent to establish [[XQ1 Platform|Space Station]] ''[[NL-1]]'' in the [[Pakuuni system/Legends|Pakuuni system]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
